title: Azalea Icons
description: Adds unique item icon for azalea and flowering azalea.
body:
# Azalea Icons **Hi!** This pack replaces the blocky icon of the Azalea and Flowering Azalea with small saplings! Now all saplings are consistent in your inventory! And some fairy told me, that this pack works well with [More Azaleas](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-azaleas)...
**Hope you like it!**
